section_miscategorizations.text: The patient will continue on aspirin.
section_miscategorizations.reason: Clinically this is a continuation of an existing medication (plan), but per the template rules, current medications the patient is already taking belong in S unless framed as a treatment change. The wording does not clearly indicate a change, so it is slightly miscategorized.
